title: leontopodium japonicum var. spathulatum
intro: Leontopodium japonicum var. spathulatum, also known as the Japanese mountain mint or Japanese edelweiss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Leontopodium japonicum var. spathulatum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Leontopodium japonicum var. spathulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
